prompt: Define the standard enthalpy change of formation.
answer: the enthalpy change when one mole of a compound is formed from its elements under standard conditions

prompt: Define the standard enthalpy change of combustion.
answer: the enthalpy change when one mole of a substance is completely burned in oxygen under standard conditions

prompt: Define standard enthalpy change of formation.
answer: the enthalpy change when one mole of a compound is formed from its elements under standard conditions with all substances in their standard states

prompt: Define standard enthalpy change of combustion.
answer: the enthalpy change when one mole of a substance is completely burned in oxygen under standard conditions with all substances in their standard states
